content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.6.1/5.6.3 — uses system SKStoreReviewController.requestReview (App/ReviewManager.swift:9-11) triggered after milestone, not gated on 5-star promise; share link in ShareSheet.swift:6 is a plain app-store link (not a write-review deep link) with no rating manipulation copy found in description.txt.
